title: Dave FAFSA — Jann/Renaissance/Diana Hoff cluster
html:
TL;DR

  • 18yo Yahir stacks five pre-OSU todos: talk to nonas about Renaissance, wrap up Jann's gift, fix bank, advance Python course, Criswell scholarship
  • Same note opens TWO drafted-but-unsent letters: "Hey Jann, I am sending this email regarding my stance on the Renaissance Scholarship. After thoroughly..." and "Dear Diana Hoff," — both abandoned mid-sentence
  • The Renaissance Scholarship becomes a recurring 2021 stress-axis: also shows up in the July 6 gratitude letter and the July contact Diana Hoff todos
  • Confirms Jann-as-scholarship-administrator role (already established) and Diana Hoff as a parallel scholarship contact — both are women whom Yahir owes formal communication to, the debt of gratitude pattern in pre-college form
  • Earliest mention of Python-course aspiration that recurs through summer 2021 (2021 08 03 kira ford mentor intro, 2021 07 28 vegetarian drive todos) — never confirmed completed

Notes

The note crystallizes a moment: the funding-stack is in place, the gratitude-letters are not yet written. Yahir owes Jann a thank-you, Diana Hoff a follow-up, and nonas a Renaissance update — and he opens drafts for two of them in the same Apple Note before drifting away. The half-drafted letter is its own genre in this corpus: see also 2021 05 30 iracema graduation letter, 2021 07 29 my guy dave, 2021 12 05 cameron ywbn pitch.

"Dave" in the note title is one of two possibilities: (a) a separate person named Dave whose FAFSA Yahir is helping with, or (b) typo for "dad's FAFSA" — given the recurring family financial helper role he plays. The April-2021 Ford/OSU prep note confirms Yahir is the family's college-finance broker, so reading this as dad-FAFSA fits — the FAFSA is for the household's resource-allocation.

The dual gift-and-letter structure (Jann gift + Jann email + Diana Hoff email) is the administrative-help-as-love pattern Yahir runs with Brenda, Jann, and his mom: gratitude is performed through paperwork.

Connections
